items.briefing:
The Australian Government has launched its Horizon 2 action plan, the next phase of Australia's national cyber security strategy. This signals continued investment in improving the country's cyber defences and may bring new requirements or guidance for organisations like ours. Separately, Scamwatch has issued a warning about food delivery scams — a timely reminder that everyday online activities can expose staff to fraud, particularly through fake delivery notifications or payment requests.

Although phishing attack volumes have dropped globally by 20%, security experts warn the risk is actually increasing as attacks become more targeted and convincing. Stay alert to suspicious messages, even if they look legitimate.

**Practical tip:** If you receive an unexpected food delivery notification or payment request, go directly to the official app or website rather than clicking any links in the message.

featured.title: Government launches Horizon 2 action plan for Australia’s cyber security strategy
featured.quote: Australia's federal government launches Horizon 2 cyber security strategy, shaping national cybersecurity policy and requirements.
